compiled_state.title: Implement Jekyll USWDS git clone install path in onboarding SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add the git clone install path to `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` for the Jekyll USWDS template (which does not use nava-platform).

### Implementation
After Phase 1.5 selects the Jekyll USWDS template (install_method: git-clone):
1. Clone template repo via git clone using the full HTTPS URL from registry metadata
2. Pre-flight: check if target directory is non-empty — warn user and offer abort or proceed
3. Check exit codes after clone
4. Surface clear errors on clone failure with manual fallback offer
5. Post-clone validation: verify cloned content is not HTML (captive portal / auth wall redirect detection)
6. Clone URL must come from registry (not hardcoded) — read from Template Selection Result scratchpad

### File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (PROTECTED — user approved)

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 1 — skill file is LLM workflow guidance, not executable code

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains git clone install path section
  Verify: grep -q "git clone\|git-clone.*install" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Non-empty directory warning
  Verify: grep -qi "non-empty\|directory.*not.*empty" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Clone failure handling
  Verify: grep -qi "clone.*fail\|clone.*error" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Captive portal detection
  Verify: grep -qi "captive\|auth.*wall\|HTML.*content" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

comments.body: Fixed: Jekyll git clone install path added to onboarding SKILL.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
